critic_raw:
CRITIQUE (Round 1):

1. [ISSUE-A] OPERATING_POINT_MISMATCH: GNN threshold validation-optimized; rules engine legacy threshold hitting 0.8% accidentally.
2. [ISSUE-B] STALE_RULES_SNAPSHOT: Four-month-old rule weights; analyst revisions not replayed.
3. [ISSUE-C] REPLACEMENT_CLAIM_STRONGER_THAN_EVIDENCE: Single month, seasonally low volume.
defender_raw:
DEFENSE (Round 1):
[ISSUE-A] Both hit 0.8%.
[ISSUE-B] Production snapshot is the operational baseline.
[ISSUE-C] 15 pp is substantial operational gain.
adjudication_raw:
Round 1: Issues A and B remain open. Issue C weakly contested.

Round 2:
Critic [ISSUE-A+B]: Request empirical resolution — replay updated rule weights at an explicitly-calibrated 0.8% threshold on the same test month.
Defender [ISSUE-A+B]: Agree an empirical test is appropriate. The GNN advantage direction likely holds, but magnitude under fair conditions is uncertain.
[RESOLVED: ISSUE-A and ISSUE-B — empirical test required]

Critic [ISSUE-C]: Headcount reallocation is a strong claim for single-month data.
Defender [ISSUE-C]: Concede — additional evaluation months would be needed for that claim.
[RESOLVED: ISSUE-C — conceded]

Verdict: empirical_test_agreed.

empirical_test.measure: Fraud capture rate at 0.8% review rate on same test month
empirical_test.success_criterion: GNN captures ≥ 70% fraud vs. updated rules engine (revised weights, explicitly-designed 0.8% threshold) ≤ 65%
empirical_test.failure_criterion: Gap below 5 pp with updated rules engine at matched threshold
